title: Preview popup is fully contained within the viewport
verifies: Preview popup bounding box is entirely inside viewport bounds (no overflow off any edge)

title: Preview popup renders pipeline flow diagram with nodes
verifies: VueFlow canvas and custom nodes render inside the preview popup with overflow:auto CSS

title: Preview popup dismisses when mouse leaves the trigger
verifies: Preview tooltip hides when mouse moves away from the view/eye button

title: Action buttons are hidden in the preview popup (read-only mode)
verifies: Node action buttons (.node-action-buttons) are not visible inside the preview popup

title: Empty pipeline preview shows blank canvas
verifies: Empty pipeline (zero nodes) shows VueFlow canvas with no custom nodes and no crash

title: Preview popup scrolls when pipeline content overflows 500x300 container
verifies: Scrollbars appear when nodes exceed 500x300; popup stays within viewport after scrolling
